events.title_en: 粵韻飄香揚英倫 2026 — Cantonese Opera Showcase
events.title_zh: 粵韻飄香揚英倫 2026 — 粵劇粵曲晚會
events.venue_en: Shaw Theatre 100, 110 Euston Rd., London NW1 2AJ
events.venue_zh: 倫敦市中心 — 場地待定
events.time_zh: 開場 下午1時 · 演出 下午1時30分
events.duration_zh: 約 2.5 小時（包括中場休息）
events.artists_en: Guest artists from China, Hong Kong and Macao with our resident ensemble
events.artists_zh: 中國內地、香港及澳門客席藝術家，聯同本會駐團樂師
events.speaker_en: Guest artists from China, Hong Kong and Macao with our resident ensemble
events.speaker_zh: 中國內地、香港及澳門客席藝術家，聯同本會駐團樂師
events.desc_en: Our flagship annual showcase returns — classic Cantonese opera with a full live ensemble.
events.desc_zh: 我們的年度旗艦演出載譽歸來，經典粵劇配以現場樂隊伴奏。
events.body_en:
Join us for an afternoon of classic Cantonese opera, performed at the highest standard we can bring to the London stage.
From celebrated love stories to rousing martial scenes, the programme moves through the colour, music and movement that make this 600-year-old art form so captivating.
events.body_zh:
誠邀您共度一個經典粵劇的下午，我們以最高水準將這門藝術帶到倫敦舞台。
由膾炙人口的愛情故事，到激昂的武場，節目盡展這門逾六百年藝術的色彩、音樂與身段。
events.programme_en:
Overture — The Festive Gong
The Floral Princess — Fragrant Sacrifice
The Purple Hairpin — Reunion by the Sword
Selected Cantonese arias
Grand Finale with full ensemble
events.programme_zh:
鬧場序曲
帝女花 — 香夭
紫釵記 — 劍合釵圓
粵曲精選
全體大合奏

events.venue_en: Shaw Theatre, 110 Euston Road, London NW1 2AJ
events.venue_zh: 倫敦邵氏劇院（110 Euston Road, NW1 2AJ）
events.artists_en: Featured nationally recognised artists from China, Hong Kong and Macao
events.artists_zh: 匯聚中國內地、香港及澳門的知名藝術家
events.desc_en: Our inaugural full-scale production — a 13-segment programme with artists from China, Hong Kong and Macao.
events.desc_zh: 我們的首屆大型演出 —— 十三個曲目，匯聚中國內地、香港及澳門的藝術家。
events.body_en: On the eve of the 2025 Mid-Autumn Festival, Yuet Wan London staged its first full-scale production at the Shaw Theatre — a thirteen-segment programme that brought together celebrated artists from across the Cantonese-speaking world.
events.body_zh: 二〇二五年中秋前夕，倫敦粵韻於邵氏劇院呈獻首屆大型演出 —— 十三個曲目，匯聚粵語世界各地的知名藝術家。
events.programme_en: A thirteen-segment programme of classic opera excerpts and Cantonese song
events.programme_zh: 十三個經典粵劇選段及粵曲曲目
